description: Converts a BAM file to a SAM file
author: Picard Tools
plan:
## Picard.BamToSam GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Picard.BamToSam is a GenePattern module that Converts a BAM file to a SAM file

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 2 parameters:
- Required: input.file, output.prefix
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>BamToSam.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-cli-1.2.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-lang-2.5.jar<path.separator><libdir>SamFormatConverter_gp_modified.jar org.genepattern.sam.SamFormat.BamToSam -inputFileName <input.file> -outputFileName <output.prefix>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: output.prefix
parameters.description: A label used to name the output file
